overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a flooded suburban neighborhood during a heavy rainstorm. The camera moves from beneath a carport past a beached boat into an open street with submerged vehicles and houses, showcasing high-fidelity game engine graphics with atmospheric lighting and water effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered carport walkway adjacent to flooded yard

agents.ego_description: wading slowly through knee-deep flood water beneath a concrete carport, moving toward the open street

entered.detail: tall white-barked tree with sparse autumn foliage and distinctive black markings
dark-colored motorboat beached or floating in the flood water near the fence line
flat concrete roof structure providing shelter overhead with visible support beams
thick square concrete pillars supporting the carport roof
white coolers or storage bins stacked under the carport shelter

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a concrete carport during a heavy downpour, with the camera wading through deep flood water. A distinctive white birch tree stands to the left while a dark motorboat rests in the flooded yard beyond. The space is sheltered from the direct rain but surrounded by falling water, creating a semi-enclosed atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded suburban residential street with submerged vehicles

events.description: exits the covered carport into the open flooded street, exposing the camera to heavy rainfall
white SUV submerged in flood water becomes clearly visible ahead through the rain and mist

agents.ego_description: continuing to wade through deep flood water in the open street, moving past submerged vehicles toward distant houses

entered.detail: white sport utility vehicle partially submerged in flood water with only the roof and upper cabin visible
single-story suburban home with yellow siding and a covered porch area
utility wires stretching horizontally across the scene between poles
house with vertical beige siding and dark roof visible on the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the carport into an open flooded residential street exposed to heavy rain. A white SUV sits submerged in the center distance while suburban houses line the flooded street. Power lines stretch overhead through the misty atmosphere as the camera continues wading forward, leaving the sheltered carport behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered confines of a carport into the exposed, rain-drenched expanse of a flooded residential street. It begins under a concrete overhang during a heavy downpour, wading through deep water past a white birch tree and a dark motorboat resting in a submerged yard. As the camera moves forward, it emerges from the shelter and enters the open street, where the atmosphere shifts to a misty, rain-swept environment. The scene then expands to reveal suburban houses lining the water and power lines stretching overhead, before continuing toward a white SUV submerged in the distance.
